title: Internal wires clash with user symbols
body:
The attached file currently causes trunk iverilog to return a rather mysterious error message:

```
iverilog bad.v
bad.v:8: error: Unable to bind wire/reg/memory `_s6' in `mod'
bad.v:8: error: Unable to elaborate r-value: _s6
2 error(s) during elaboration.
```

After some debugging I realized that _s6 in my code collides with internal auto-generated wire created by synthesizer. Not sure whether this can be fixed or not but I believe we can at least make the error more informative.

[bad.v.txt](https://github.com/steveicarus/iverilog/files/307661/bad.v.txt)
code_blocks:
iverilog bad.v
bad.v:8: error: Unable to bind wire/reg/memory `_s6' in `mod'
bad.v:8: error: Unable to elaborate r-value: _s6
2 error(s) during elaboration.
